title: Perfect World Gen
description: Made for my YouTube big globe series. Improves world gen and exploration while providing options to make beautiful cinematic views!
body:
**If you need a server and want to support me:** [https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/9LQHF](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/9LQHF)


This modpack was originally created and published for my "Big Globe" YouTube series, which features the Big Globe mod by BuilderB0y. 

This modpack allows for beautiful and cinematic world generation while still creating terrifying situations in survival. Several mods affecting structure spawning and exploration are installed.

**If you want frames:**

_DISABLE THE MOD DISTANT HORIZONS_

_TURN OFF SHADERS_

_TURN DOWN RENDER DISTANCE_
